nodes.label: AI as marketing content generator
nodes.grounding_span: The creative aspect is easier to let go of

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: Blind trust in AI for critical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I do not want to blindly trust AI to do them

nodes.label: AI as routine task handler
nodes.grounding_span: Usually I let it handle it independently

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: I do see potentially having it run the numbers on projections

nodes.label: Creative expression and quality
nodes.grounding_span: I struggle with being creative and have a hard time making things sound fun and exciting

nodes.label: Financial accuracy and trust
nodes.grounding_span: All of the financial tasks are done by me

nodes.label: Autonomy and self-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I never want to rely on AI to the point that I could not run my business without it

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: when the suggestions are good its great

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: When I have to keep asking for another idea or correct something a few times I get frustrated

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I honestly don't think I will ever be comfortable with it taking over some areas completely

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: Emails, scheduling, and keeping track of things are some areas I would consider using it

nodes.label: Iterative evaluation and correction
nodes.grounding_span: If the suggestion is bad and I do not think the flavors will taste good I will tell it so and have it try again

nodes.label: Domain-specific delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: All of the financial tasks are done by me as well as the scheduling
